reviews.review_text: A wonderful stay in a very beautiful, well appointed cabin.

A great park with amazing views.
Very friendly owners

I have very fond memories of Boat Harbour🩷 we used to stay here every year when I was little in a shack that is still here & is the same colour as it was.   Just love this place.   We stayed in our camper on a powered site , lush green grass & the view to die for 🩵🩵🩵🩵
Great position with views over Bass Strait, excellent facilities and friendly people- this is the best caravan park we have stayed at in Tassie!
Absolutely loved this place. So neat and tidy and beautiful. Made you feel like you were at home. A very cool vibe. Highly recommend. (P.S we didn't find the cave 🤣)

Manager is a bit of a Rain Man. So may over react to some situations. Just smile and ignore him.🤣🤠
PS. I don't own a boat, manager must have over reacted to someone else again.🤣
Absolutely gorgeous caravan park with beautiful grassed sites, amazing views and great amenities. The owner is lovely and happy to help. We stayed for 1 night but wish we could’ve stayed longer!

I must correct/comment upon the review left by Shane Spano. I have not found a more helpful and competent site manager in over 50 years of camping, travelling and enjoying resorts.
Everything from phoning ahead to reserve a powered site after a long trip from Sydney to changing a flat tyre for me on my motorhome when I was in real trouble with no help from my 24/7 roadside assist service.
I had picked up a nail while exploring the beachfront and was faced with going nowhere until my roadside assist service worked out if they could help me in NW Tasmania.
The manager stepped in and facilitated the total wheel change with a smile. Then went back to ensuring other guests had a pristine clean caravan park. He is a legend and the place is well worth a stay.
Great spot, shame that the person running the place has no interest in feedback!
Good clean park. Awesome views will definitely return
I come here every summer and it's just fantastic, great location, good amenities and friendly owners! Will be back again

First time leaving a negative review on any platform after staying at over 50 campsites and caravan parks

The bloke running this site is incompetent, arrogant, confrontational and flat out stupid

I rang him to give him a courtesy that the powered site I was on is clearly not earthed as I was receiving excess electrical current passing through the chassis on my caravan

He blatantly denied it, refused to take any ownership, accountability and responsibility as a caravan park manager. He tried to send us away and send we were the problem

Lucky for us we can rely on batteries and solar so we stayed even though he was so rude and confrontational. We waited until another camper parked next to us, they too had the same problem. We then went onto numerous other caravan parks with no issues. At these other caravan parks it was a hot topic about this bloke and how everyone else had unnecessary altercations with him. Even the caravan park managers and reception were talking about him

Pick a new job mate, one that is isolated from human beings as clearly you don’t like or have any time for people

Apart from him, the campsite was well maintained and had a great view

It’s unfortunate that many people will not return due to his poor attitude

We don’t normally stay at “caravan parks” but this place has to be one of the nicest carvan parks in Australia, let alone Tassie. The places are well spaced out, the facilities are very new and clean and the place is ridiculously cheap and good value.

Boat Harbour holiday park is a must stay destination for anyone visiting Tasmania. The park has exceptional sea views over Boat Harbour and is very well managed. Amenities are spotless and the owner pays attention to every detail to make your stay enjoyable. We will be back!

We stayed over New Years 2025/26 in the Boat Harbour cabin with two small children and it was wonderful. The cabin has two bedrooms, a queen and two singles, washing machine, aircon, stocked kitchen for cooking. We were also provided with a bbq on request.

The park, cabins and facilities are modern and well maintained. There’s a short walk up the back hill to watch sunsets and have a beer on couches.

The beach which is beautiful but cold if you aren’t use to Tasmania waters. It is a short walk down a very steep hill we drove and walked down. When it is busy parking is limited. The new building development should hopefully be ready for Xmas.

The owners take great pride in their holiday park and are a wealth of knowledge of the surrounding areas. Sisters beach a short drive away has a good playground for kids plus another beach to check out.
Great facilities, service, location and the views! Did i mention the views!!

This park is absolutely wonderful. We booked a night in one of the cabins and scored the one at the front calked Jacobs. It was spotless with a beautiful view, great amenities within and everything required for a perfect stay. Really helpful owners who keep the grounds in golf course condition. The café down the road provides a delicious breakfast to top things off. Highly recommended.
This is an amazing park , beautiful gardens, unreal view of the harbour, clean ammenities & leather couches up on the hill for viewing . Highly recommend !!

Jaw dropping location, breathtaking views, beautiful sites and facilities, great price, helpful friendly owner, great b’fast and coffee at the local cafe the next morning - I could go on but you probably get the general idea! Probably a little tight for larger vans otherwise all good!

What a beautiful little spot. The owner keeps the caravan park absolutely spotless and what a view.
We loved our stay here and the owner went above and beyond to make our stay memorable. Totally recommend this park.
Absolutely magnificent place, facilities are only a few years old.  The owner was so friendly and accommodating with lots of advice on the area.  The view from the park was magical.

This place is a beautiful piece of paradise...a hidden gem. We stayed up top of the hill with a magnificent view of the bay. Professional and friendly service, clean & tidy. Will definitely visit again🤗
Spectacular white sandy beach nestled within an azure blue water cove with a lovely cafe and amenities right on the foreshore. The perfect spot for a family weekend getaway.
Such a beautiful beach. Have a restaurant near the beach. Good food good services. Seafood basket is so lovely delicious.

This is a wonderful spot, a short walk to the beach and with a lovely view of the water.
Facilities are great, quite new and always clean, and tent sites are grass

Such a great spot - the view from the holiday park is incredible! We stayed here a for a night at a powered site in a campervan and were warmly welcomed by the hosts who were very helpful and accommodating. Ammenities are well set up and maintained. Would recommend and look forward to our next stay!

Phone booked for two nights but extended to 3. Powered site, amazing views over the harbour and really lovely owners. Site sizes and views vary, amenities are unisex separate toilets with basin and a row of showers with basin. Showers are $1 coin operated (about 3 minutes) as park is on tank water. Washing machine available with an honesty box $4 per load. Plenty of line space.
Roads in and out are steep and windy in parts. The park itself is terraced on a steep hill. We used low range and took it slow and had no issues.
Plenty of Pademelons grazing every afternoon, lots of photo opportunities.

Beautiful spot with great views and clean toilets. Showers weren’t that hot and you had to pay for them ($1 for 3 minutes), which didn’t really make sense considering you’re already paying to stay there. Laundry was $4 per load and only cold water was available. One of the owners told us there was no set check-out time and that we could leave whenever we liked, so we planned our morning around that. But the next day, her husband came over and, not very nicely, told us we had to leave — that if we stayed past midday, we’d have to pay for another night. So we had to stop cooking, pack up our wet clothes from the line, and hit the road. Bit of a poor move on their part — just set a clear check-out time so people know what to expect. Don’t say we can leave whenever, then change your mind the next morning.

Can’t be a coincidence that most of the negative reviews seem to be about him.
Awesome

Fabulous camping site -
*Great, clean amenities
*Friendly helpful management
*Beautiful beach an easy walk down the road
Friendly staff, lovely spot, clean amenities, awesome view.
Beautiful white sand clear aqua water very serene

I tried to book accommodation at the park and encountered an extremely rude and unhelpful man on the phone. I called back, hoping for a better experience, but he was even worse. I've decided to book elsewhere and will warn others not to stay here, as I can’t imagine how they would handle any problems at the park.
Our cabin is called The Boathouse and it is spacious and comfortable and has a fabulous view!

We recently spent 3 nights here on our travels and wish we stayed longer, what a beautiful spot! Stunning views from the very tidy holiday park and super clean amenities. I would say the sites up top are for more experienced drivers but we got our big bailey up, and were given a few options we could park at if we didn't feel comfortable trying. Highly recommend relaxing here for a few days.

We recently had two nights on a caravan site at the park. Darren met us on arrival and was welcoming and very pleasant. He showed us to our site and guided me as I backed our van. The park and its setting is exceptional! The amenities are outstanding and incredibly clean and well maintained. There is obvious pride in owning and managing this park and making sure that everyone has a wonderful stay. Thank you Darren and Suzanne for your hospitality and we will definitely be return guests 😊
Lovely spacious sites all with views of the beach, modern showas and toilet facilities, owners very warm, friendly and responsive.
Amazing!! Thanks Darren
Top spot! Great facilities and we were well looked after on short notice.
Great place to stay as it was very clean and modern. Hosts easy to talk too
Best caravan park- incredible views, lovely owner, spacious spots and great amenities. Hope to come back soon!

Extremely rude owner - Your response is proof of that.
I have read some of your reviews also,
some of your reviews  are far from pleasant.
I am far from a keyboard warrior, and far from entitled or sensitive.
You don't know me at all...
You were the one who was very sarcastic when I advised you I had decided not to stay, and I told you why.
You seem to have a nasty chip on your shoulder. I suggest you work on losing it...

This place is absolutely picturesque. Only suitable for small to medium vans. The views are amazing. The beach, cafe is all in walking distance although your legs will feel the burn on the way back. I could stay here forever

Great views. Clean amenities though you are required to pay for shower hot water.   Quite an uphill to get home if you choose to go for a walk. A camp kitchen is available but we didn't require it.
The owner is efficient in keeping the grounds neat and tidy. Lovely grassed areas and good gardens.

We stayed in the park about 3 weeks ago, one of our top 3 parks to stay in whilst visiting Tasmania.  Fabulous views,  and Darren was very helpful, even  parking my van for me, in a tight spot,  so we got the best view.  Loved Boat Harbour Beach Holiday park.

Absolutely rudest  owner
I had an extremely unpleasant experience at this caravan park. The owner was incredibly rude and disrespectful. Darren showed no professionalism or politeness towards us as guests, his attitude completely ruined what could have been a pleasant stay. I would NOT recommend this place to anyone. Extremely sad to think Darren is running a caravan park in Tasmania.

NOT WORTH THE VISIT! 😡

What a beautiful and friendly caravan park, gorgeous views, clean, everything looking new and lots of gorgeous dogs to pat here too ! Great host and a great little town and an easy walk to a stunning beach and Seekers Cafe at the life saving club with amazing food and wine and views, luved our 4 nights here thank you 🤩 If we could we would have " 1 more night " 😁
Outstanding holiday park, highly recommend making it part of your itinerary whilst lapping around TAS

One of the nicest parks we've had the pleasure to stay in in our beautiful home state and on the mainland! Very friendly manager, always ensuring the amenities were spotless. Boat Harbour is amazing so we will certainly be back, the cabins looked awesome too! Fabulous views throughout. The park couldn't be seen from the beach so didn't impact on Boat Harbour, very thoughtful.
Stayed a great cabin with amazing views

This is such a great holiday park, good sized spots with power/water (if required). Amenities were 1st
Class, clean and hot water ($1 for 3 mins)…manager was pleasant and accommodating.  We arrived early and allowed us to park up until our spot was available. Beach short walk was amazing.
Some people
Complain about the park, but our stay and interaction was 100% positive and would definitely highly recommend and stay again. 10/10…👍
@good different adventures.

Ein wunderschöner, gepflegter kleiner Campingplatz. Wir waren glücklich dort für 2 Nächte mit unserem Camper einen Stopp eingelegt zu haben. Der Chef vom Campingplatz ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit, wir haben uns rundum wohlgefühlt.
Astrid und Uli

This is the quaint little boutique van Park you need to visit to experience the Tassie coastline and beaches for yourself. Beautiful grassy sites and well kept amenities thanks to Darren. Views to die for and nice viewing area up the track with couches to kick back and unwind.
Had a nice little surf out front of surfclub too. What a perfect location for a holiday.

We've been eagerly anticipating a visit to Boat Harbour Caravan Park for quite some time, and this year we finally decided to spend three days at this seemingly beautiful location. However, our experience with this caravan park left much to be desired, and we hope this review proves useful to others considering a stay.

We reached out to the place three times, ultimately deciding against going to Boat Harbour due to the less-than-pleasant encounters with the owner/receptionist. Unfortunately, on two out of the three occasions, the phone was abruptly hung up on us.

During our first call, despite making an inquiry four weeks in advance, we were met with a rather dismissive response. In essence, we were told, "Perhaps we need to be more organized with planning our holidays as all the spots were already booked out."

The second call, where we were exploring options for a later date with some availability, ended abruptly with the advice to check their website for all necessary information.

Finally, on the third call, after having a clear idea of what we wanted to book and when (six to seven weeks in advance), we were informed that sites next to each other couldn't be guaranteed. The response, "Perhaps we need to explore the other caravan parks in the area," was followed by the man hanging up on us.

Given these experiences, we recommend exploring other camping or staying options to avoid potential sour memories and associations with this supposedly beautiful place.
Very quite and clean. Definitely recommended

We were absolutely blown away by this park. Darren recommended the perfect spot to park our van, that gave us views and we sat thinking how magic the place was. His care and pride in the grounds and gardens is instantly apparent and all amenities were spotless.
Boat Harbour is a stunning little place and it is great to be able to camp there for a reasonable price. We will be back!

Clean showers and toilets. 3 minute showers cost 1 AUD. The kitchen was small but adequately stocked with equipment and clean. Nice camp manager and fair prices for the night. Extremely beautiful view.
Stayed on a powered site for 2 nights, beautiful location, elevated view looking over beach and Bass Strait. Owners were great to talk to and the amenities were spotless. I will be coming back.
Stayed in a cabin, fantastic views, very friendly owners.  Boat Harbour was a great little seaside town and was a great place to explore from.

Great little spot a stop over.
The park is a decent size and sites staggered up the hill with plenty of space between each other and guaranteed to get a good view of the harbour.

The park has decent amenities, showers $1 for 3 minutes. Enough for a decent shower. Toilets are great and a few spread around the park. The kitchen is small but enough to get the job done. Laundry that works on an honest system and a decent clothes line to dry them off.

Definitely recommend a night here if it's on the way or outta the way. Perfect little spot.
Enjoy the walk up the hill when you head in to visit the town.
Lovely modern quiet cabin, beautiful vieww

Somewhat stumbled across this holiday park with the plan to pitch a tent. Ended up upgrading to one of the self contained units and had such a lovely stay! Great amenities, clean, really friendly owners. Highly recommend.
Thank you 🙏
